summary: Fleet Performance Refactor testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All endpoints return correct data. Planning page loads in ~2 seconds (massive improvement from previous 16+ seconds). Source filter, all views (day/week/month), conflict check, rest days all functional.

backend_tests.test_planning_day_view_events_have_sourc: PASS - All events have source field (zont/company)
backend_tests.test_bookings_returns_list: PASS - Returns auction list with scanned extras
backend_tests.test_driver_rides_returns_history: PASS - Returns ride history with forfaits

frontend_tests.view_buttons_present: PASS - Jour/Semaine/Mois buttons visible and clickable
frontend_tests.source_filter_buttons: PASS - Tout/Societe/Zont buttons present and functional
frontend_tests.zont_filter_works: PASS - Shows only green Zont events
frontend_tests.societe_filter_works: PASS - Shows only blue company events
frontend_tests.tout_filter_works: PASS - Shows all events from both sources
frontend_tests.unassigned_panel_shows_badges: PASS - '2 Societe' badge visible in header

verified_features: POST /api/fleet/auth/login returns accessToken and company data
GET /api/fleet/planning?view=day returns correct data (drivers, events, unassigned)
GET /api/fleet/planning?view=week returns correct data for 7 days
GET /api/fleet/planning?view=month returns correct data for full month
GET /api/fleet/bookings returns auction list with scanned extras
GET /api/fleet/drivers/{id}/rides returns ride history with forfaits
Source filter (Tout/Societe/Zont) on Planning page works correctly
Planning page loads within 5 seconds (1.95s achieved)
critical_code_review_comments: fleet_shared.py properly implements connection pooling with httpx.AsyncClient
In-memory cache with 30s TTL working correctly
asyncio.gather used for parallel C# API calls - significant performance gain
Reduced auction scan range (35→18 IDs) - faster hidden auction detection
MongoDB indexes created on startup for fleet_reservations, driver_rest_days, driver_forfaits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet Performance Refactor fully tested. All endpoints work correctly after major backend optimization. Key changes verified: shared HTTP client, parallel asyncio.gather, 30s cache, reduced scan range, MongoDB indexes. Planning page loads in ~2s (was 16+ seconds). Use test credentials: Nandetiri1@gmail.com / 12345678. March 2026 has good test data with both Zont and Company events.

mocked_api.note: Uses live C# backend (api.zont.cab) + MongoDB. No mocking.
